accommodations.text: Read test directions and math word problems aloud on request.
accommodations.source_quote: read test directions and math word problems aloud

accommodations.text: Provide a peer notetaker or copy of lecture notes.
accommodations.source_quote: peer notetaker or copy of lecture notes

accommodations.text: Provide a word bank for written-response items in reading and history.
accommodations.source_quote: provide a word bank for written-response items

accommodations.text: Provide a visual schedule for each class period.
accommodations.source_quote: visual schedule for each class period

accommodations.text: Break multi-step directions into chunked, numbered steps.
accommodations.source_quote: break multi-step directions into numbered steps

accommodations.text: Accept typed responses in place of extended handwriting.
accommodations.source_quote: accept typed responses in place of extended handwriting

accommodations.text: Repeat and rephrase spoken directions on request.
accommodations.source_quote: repeat and rephrase spoken directions on request

accommodations.text: Allow text-to-speech for grade-level reading passages.

goals.text: Grace will accept a change in routine using a coping strategy in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Accepts a change in routine in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: accept a change in routine using a coping strategy

goals.text: Oscar will use a checklist to organize materials for each class in 8 of 10 days.
goals.source_quote: use a checklist to organize materials for each class

goals.text: Ethan will complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities without redirection.
goals.baseline: Completes in-class assignments in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities

goals.text: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Begins a task within two minutes in 1 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: independently begin a classroom task within two minutes

goals.text: Marcus will use a taught script to join a peer activity in 3 of 4 structured opportunities.
goals.baseline: Joins a peer activity with adult prompting in 1 of 4 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: use a taught script to join a peer activity
